name: wise
description: Wise API workflow plugin for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Wise profiles, balances, quotes, recipients, transfers, and statements.
interface.longDescription: Wise gives Codex a reusable workflow for the Wise Platform API through the published wise-cli command surface. It helps with token setup, profiles, balances, recipients, quotes, transfers, statements, supported currencies, and raw Wise API requests while keeping live tokens out of files and logs.
defaultPrompt: Check my Wise CLI auth status.
List my Wise profiles and balances.
Create a Wise quote from JSON.
